---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or extension
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

Who needs this and why? What is the user-facing motivation?

## Proposal

Describe what you want to add or change. Reference the relevant L1 BC (L1-01..L1-10) and any IC contract that would be touched.

## Alternatives

What did you consider? Why is this better?

## DoD impact

Does this require:

- [ ] A new DoD predicate (would need ADR + `whitelist_version` bump)
- [ ] A new hard redline class (would need `hard-redlines.md` update)
- [ ] A new IC contract (would need `ic-contracts.md` lock)
- [ ] None of the above (pure internal change)

## Backward compatibility

Will existing projects keep working without changes?
